text: I answer the phone at work.
Maísa speaking. How can I help you?
Hold on, please. One moment.
Would you like to leave a message?
Could you call me back later?
I say goodbye and hang up.
Sorry, the line is busy right now.
Sorry, this is the wrong number.
Can I speak to David, please?
Who is calling, please?
Could you call back later?
Good afternoon, finance team. Maísa speaking.
Hi, this is David. Can I speak to Sarah, please?
One moment, please. Hold on. I am sorry, Sarah is not here right now.
Oh, no problem. Can I leave a message?
Of course. Who is calling, please?
This is David, from the London office. Could you ask her to call me back?
Sure. I will ask Sarah to call you back.
Thank you very much. Have a good day!
Good morning, finance team. Maísa speaking.
One moment, please. Hold on.

Hi, this is David. I am calling about our project. I am sorry, I missed your call this morning. The line was busy. Could you call me back this afternoon? I am free after two o'clock. If I do not answer, please leave a message, and I will call you back. Thank you, and have a good day. Bye!

Good morning. This is Sarah from the finance team. I have a message for you. A new client called this morning, but you were not at your desk. He wants to speak to you today. Could you call him back before five o'clock? His name is Mr. Costa. If the line is busy, please try again later. Do not forget to call him back today. Thank you very much. Talk soon!
Hello, can I speak to David, please? I am sorry, he is not here right now. Would you like to leave a message? Thank you. I will ask him to call you back.
I answer the phone at work.
Maísa speaking. How can I help you?
Hold on, please. One moment.
Would you like to leave a message?
Could you call me back later?
I say goodbye and hang up.
Sorry, the line is busy right now.
Sorry, this is the wrong number.
Can I speak to David, please?
Who is calling, please?
One moment, please. Hold on.
Good morning, finance team. Maísa speaking.
